arts.ttl: Inter aiming to bounce back against Verona
arts.sum: Inter are both the team that have beaten Hellas Verona the most times in Serie A (41), and the team that have scored the most against the Gialloblu in the competition (117 goals). Indeed, he is currently the Hellas Verona player with the most goals scored by those who have only netted away from home in a single Serie A season (Emiliano Mascetti with three in 1971/72).
